title: Chiewab Amalgamated Pharmaceuticals Company

'''Chiewab Amalgamated Pharmaceuticals Company''' was a medical, chemical and pharmaceutical equipment conglomerate which controlled over six hundred [[Star system/Legends|star systems]].<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> [[Scout/Legends|Scouts]] employed by Chiewab laid claim to many newly discovered [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], and the company exploited these planets in the development of new biotech products. After the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Chiewab Pharmaceuticals became a voting sponsor of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] and received a seat on its [[Executive Directorship Board]].

Chiewab was seen as the leading manufacturer in the biotechnological field with one of their rivals being [[BioTech Industries/Legends|BioTech Industries]]. It manufactured the immensely popular [[GLiS Emergency Medpac]] and the [[GH-7 medical analysis unit]].

They were the parent corporation of [[Chiewab Nutrition]], the [[Corellian Chemical Corporation/Legends|Corellian Chemical Corporation]], [[Degan Explorations/Legends|Degan Explorations]], and [[Geentech]].<ref name="HSCS" />

{{Company-stub}}
